note: Per-boss rough time-to-kill (seconds), respawn/downtime, effective kills-per-hour, and attempts-per-kill (novice fail rate). For raids/minigames ttkSeconds is one full run. Used with each CA's kill count to estimate real grind time. Estimates, not guarantees.

Aberrant Spectre.note: Slayer-task fodder; Magic/Salve or strong melee. Multiple spawns in the spectre area keep it near-continuous; small walk/re-aggro between kills.

Abyssal Sire.note: Melee/Magic, ~95+ Slayer. Multi-phase (stun spawns, vents, walk-back to vents, respawn portal); downtime is re-entry and re-stunning.

Alchemical Hydra.note: Requires 95 Slayer + task; 4 phases with attack-style/prayer swaps and poison pools. Assumes ranged (bowfa/blowpipe) + decent gear. Downtime is walk-back/re-aggro within instance.

Amoxliatl.note: Easy small-scale boss; competent ~40 KPH (65+ maxed). ttk short; respawn = brief reset/re-aggro. Near-continuous grinding.

Araxxor.note: Solo instance; melee/range with leg-phase + enrage. ttk is the fight; respawn = re-enter instance, restock. Acid/cleave mechanics add some variance.

Barrows.note: One full run = 6 brothers + tunnel/chest. Trident/blood spells or melee. ttk is the whole run; downtime is bank/teleport/re-dig between chests.

Basilisk Knight.note: Requires Mirror/Reflect shield; melee. Jadinkos/limited spawns in the Jormungand cave create some downtime hopping between them.

Black Dragon.note: Anti-dragon protection + ranged/melee. Overworld (Taverley/Evil Chicken lair); few spawns mean hopping/walking, so notable re-aggro downtime.

Bloodveld.note: Slayer task; magic-defence-low so melee/Salve shreds them. Dense spawns (Catacombs/Meiyerditch) keep it nearly continuous.

Brutal Black Dragon.note: 84 Slayer; anti-dragon + ranged (DHCB/bowfa). Catacombs spawns are decent; modest walk/re-aggro between kills.

Brutus.note: F2P cow boss, near-instant kill (spec/Dharok's; elite CA is <2s). Downtime dominates: 21.6s respawn normally, 7.8s with cowbell amulet 'Ring' - rate assumes cowbell. Without it ~130/hr.

Bryophyta.note: Moss Giant boss; requires mossy key per kill. ttk modest with melee; downtime is banking/keys and instance re-entry, key supply is the real cap.

Callisto.note: Wilderness boss (singles-plus); ranged/melee. Downtime is re-spawn + PKer risk/hopping. CA kills achievable solo; timing assumes no deaths.

Cerberus.note: Melee/ranged with prayer-flicking the souls; ~50-55s kill plus brief lair re-entry/setup. Spawn-heavy CAs (e.g. Triple Threat) may force a slower attack pattern.

Chambers of Xeric.note: Normal CoX, competent team ~25-35min; solo ~40min+. Setup/restock between raids. ~2 runs/hr in a team.

Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode.note: CM raid much harder than normal; competent team ~50-70min, solo well over an hour. Restock/setup between. Roughly 1/hr or less.

Chaos Elemental.note: Wildy boss; ranged/crossbow. ~50s kill but disarm mechanic and walk-back/teleport-clutter add downtime; ~30s realistic between kills.

Chaos Fanatic.note: Wildy boss, ranged/mage. Quick kill ~30-40s; respawn timer plus repositioning. Low-hanging CA target.

Commander Zilyana.note: Sara GWD; fast kill but KC-gating or instance reset adds downtime. Assumes minions cleared/instanced; ~45/hr.

Corporeal Beast.note: Solo with spec-heavy gear (BGS/Voidwaker) takes ~4min; large HP pool and 50% magic damage reduction. Most CAs are solo-doable but slow.

Corrupted Hunllef.note: Corrupted Gauntlet; ttk is one full run including ~7-9min prep (resource gathering, gear crafting) plus the boss. Respawn = re-entry/new instance setup. Many CAs here are very hard.

Crazy Archaeologist.note: Wildy boss, ranged. Fast ~30-40s kill; respawn plus reposition. Avoid 'Rubble' AoE for some CAs.

Crystalline Hunllef.note: Corrupted/Crystal Gauntlet final boss; ttk is the boss fight only but realistically it's a full ~17min Gauntlet run (prep+boss). Trid->relics weapon swap, 3 prayer flicks. Counting full run incl prep+restart: ~3/hr.

Dagannoth Prime.note: Wiki respawn is 150 ticks = 90s. The slowest kill of the three: Prime is tankiest against its own weakness, with a ranged defence roll of 19,536 - 1.9x Supreme's - so a ~90 Ranged account barely out-rolls it. Pray Magic, kill with ranged.

Dagannoth Rex.note: Wiki respawn is 150 ticks = 90s. Rex has Magic level 0 so magic hits ~99%, but a trident is low damage: ~6 DPS against 255 HP is ~40s. The easiest of the three - pray Melee, one style.

Dagannoth Supreme.note: Wiki respawn is 150 ticks = 90s. Lowest defence level (128) and only +10 melee defence, so melee is right, but 255 HP at realistic accuracy is ~50s, not the 18s previously recorded - that figure needed 14.2 DPS, beyond even a maxed Scythe setup.

Demonic Gorilla.note: Prayer-switching every ~3 attacks; ~60-80s with tridents/crossbow swaps. Continuous since multiple spawn in cave; minimal walk.

Deranged Archaeologist.note: Fossil Island, non-wildy so no risk; ranged ~30-40s. Dodge 'Learn to Read' AoE. Quick respawn/reset.

Doom of Mokhaiotl.note: Run = full Delve 1-8 clear (the CA-relevant unit); wiki ~6 completions/hr competent (scorching bow users ~5). Boss scales each delve level; deeper 1-16 runs are ~2-2.5/hr. ttk shown is one 1-8 run.

Duke Sucellus.note: Easiest DT2 boss; melee/range. ttk includes the awaken phase; respawn = teleport, restock, re-enter. Fairly low-variance once gear is decent.

Fire Giant.note: Slayer/regular monster; competent gear melts them ~15-20s. Multi-spawn dungeons keep it near-continuous; only one CA tier.

Fortis Colosseum.note: Full 12-wave run to Sol Heredit = one completion (~25-35 min). ttk is the run; respawn = restock/setup before re-entry. Many CAs are per-wave so partial runs count; full clear is the long pole. ~2 full runs/hr.

Fragment of Seren.note: Song of the Elves quest boss / Gauntlet-tier fight; multi-phase. Hard one-off but doable ~2.5 min with good gear + prayer flicking.

Galvek.note: Dragon Slayer II quest boss; only re-fightable via the fight replay (boss portal). Multi-phase ~2-3min plus lengthy re-setup/dialogue to restart.

Gargoyle.note: Slayer monster, needs rock hammer to finish. ~12-16s kill in multi-spawn area; effectively continuous.

General Graardor.note: Bandos GWD; melee (with ranged/mage for minions). Quick kills; downtime from KC requirement to re-enter and minion cleanup. Much faster duoed.

Giant Mole.note: Salve/crush melee; burrows and relocates so chase/dig downtime. ~60s kill + ~25s reposition/instance reset.

Giants.note: Generic giants (Hill/Moss/Fire) for CA tasks; trivial kills, fast respawn at multi-spawn spots. Mid-level melee gear.

Glough.note: Monkey Madness II quest boss / re-fight via Maniacal monkey area teleport. Multi-phase (demon adds). Assumes mid-game melee/ranged gear; downtime for re-entry and phase transitions.

Greater Demon.note: Slayer/overworld trash; Catacombs or Skeletal Mystics-style stacks. Cannon optional. Fast melee/ranged kills, brief re-aggro/walk between spawns.

Grotesque Guardians.note: Dusk+Dawn two-phase fight; ~90-120s with good DPS. Requires Slayer task assignment normally; instance re-entry adds downtime.

Hellhound.note: Slayer task; Catacombs/Stronghold Slayer Cave. High volume, minimal downtime. Cannon dramatically raises rate; estimate is melee no-cannon.

Hespori.note: Farming Guild boss, once-per-seed grow cycle so true rate is gated by farming, not combat. ttk is the fight; respawn here represents setup/teleport per attempt. Multi-phase (flowers spawn).

K'ril Tsutsaroth.note: GWD Zamorak boss, melee BIS; ~30-40s kill but KC-gathering/minion clear + instance re-entry adds downtime. Rate reflects instanced trips.

Kalphite Queen.note: Two phases needing range+melee style swap (e.g. bowfa then melee). Lair has spawn cycle/instance hop downtime. Assumes solid mid-high gear.

King Black Dragon.note: Instanced via lever; antifire required. Single-phase tanky dragon. Downtime is instance re-entry/banking trips. Melee or ranged mid-game gear.

Kraken.note: Slayer-locked; whirlpool disturb + tentacles then boss. Magic (trident/sang) standard. Solo instance, AFK-ish; downtime is re-entry/whirlpool reset between kills.

Kree'arra.note: Armadyl GWD; ranged (bowfa/blowpipe). Fast kills but KC grind to enter + minions; solo downtime is killcount/re-setup. Faster in teams.

Kurask.note: Slayer task; needs leaf-bladed weapon or broad bolts/magic dart. Fremennik Slayer Dungeon stack. Steady melee/ranged kills with short re-aggro.

Leviathan.note: Ranged (bowfa/tbow). ttk is the fight; respawn = teleport out, restock, re-enter instance. Prayer-flick / boulder mechanics add some kill-time variance.

Lizardman Shaman.note: Melee/range with decent gear; Lizardman Canyon multi-spawn keeps near-continuous. Some downtime hunting spawns/spawned-minion mechanic; ~100/hr realistic.

Moons of Peril.note: Full 3-moon run (Blood/Blue/Eclipse) = one 'completion'. ttk is the whole circuit; respawn = open Lunar Chest + walk/reset between runs. Competent gear ~10 runs/hr.

Nex.note: Mass/small team; ~2.5-4min per kill in a team. 4 phases. Downtime for prayer/loot/re-aggro and waiting for kill. Range gear assumed.

Obor.note: Hill Giant boss; requires Giant Key per kill so gated by key drops. ttk fast with decent melee; respawn reflects re-entry + key acquisition between attempts.

Phantom Muspah.note: Solo instanced; ~2-3min per kill with prayer/range/melee swaps. Multi-phase (ranged/melee/shielded). Quick re-entry between kills.

Phosani's Nightmare.note: Solo-only; ~9-12min per kill for competent player. Multi-phase with sleepwalkers/totems. BiS melee assumed; re-setup between kills.

Royal Titans.note: Branda + Eldric duo fight, solo-able; competent ~55 KPH. ttk = one paired kill (must manage element-swap mechanic); respawn = quick re-enter. Near-continuous.

Sarachnis.note: Crush melee (Salve), instanced. ~45s kill + re-enter/aggro. Solid ~60/hr for competent gear.

Scorpia.note: Wildy boss; crush/range with prayer. Guardians + relocation add downtime; PKer risk ignored for timing.

Scurrius.note: Solo instance, low-level boss. Fast kill with any decent melee/range; respawn = leave instance and re-enter (cheap). Continuous-ish for CA grinding.

Shellbane gryphon.note: Slayer mini-boss, must be on a gryphon task; ~50-65 kills/hr competent. Needs >=40kg equip weight to negate knockback. Downtime = re-entry/walk-back into the Great Conch cave between kills.

Skeletal Wyvern.note: Slayer monster not boss; needs elemental/dragonfire shield. Range/melee. Multi-spawn cave keeps near-continuous; ~70/hr.

Skotizo.note: Every kill consumes a Dark totem, which is three pieces at 1/(500-HP) from Catacombs of Kourend monsters - about 1,395 hill giant kills, or ~3.5 hours, per totem. The pieces are UNTRADEABLE, so no amount of gold shortcuts it. The respawn carries that farm; killsPerHour is 0 because the true rate is ~0.29/hr and the field is an integer.

Tempoross.note: Group activity; ~5-7min per round including spirit pool/restock. Fishing 35+, harpoon assumed. Rounds back-to-back with brief reset.

The Hueycoatl.note: Solo competent ~7 min (BIS solo ~8:20; trios ~5 min). Multi-phase with relic-shielded body. ttk is the kill; respawn = restock/teleport. Often done grouped, but solo is the CA-relevant figure.

The Mimic.note: Reached only by rolling a mimic from an elite (1/35) or master (1/15) reward casket after enabling the encounter at Watson's, so roughly 18 elite or 8 master trails per fight. The fight itself is ~3 min; the respawn carries the access cost, which is what makes the curated 1 kill/hr true. Not repeatable on demand.

The Nightmare.note: Solo competent ~5-7 min including totem phases; respawn/setup + run-in. Phosani's would be slower; assumes regular solo.

Theatre of Blood.note: Full normal-mode raid, competent trio/group ~35-45min including wipes/deaths; setup+restock between runs. Solo/duo slower. CA tasks span many runs.

Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode.note: Story/entry mode, much softer; ~15-25min for competent team or solo. Lower DPS requirement. Setup/restock between runs.

Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode.note: Experienced trio/team HMT ~25-35min full run. BiS gear assumed; harder enrage mechanics. Banking/restock between runs.

Thermonuclear Smoke Devil.note: Slayer helm + melee/ranged; ~40s kill, instance re-entry/setup downtime. Requires smoke devil task or boss-only instance.

Tombs of Amascut.note: Standard ~300-400 invo solo; ~22-28min full run. BiS-ish gear. Banking/restock and path reset between raids.

Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode.note: Low/0 invocation; softer, ~16-22min solo. Forgiving mechanics. Setup/restock between raids.

Tombs of Amascut: Expert Mode.note: 500+ invocation; ~28-35min solo for competent player, harder mechanics/more HP. Restock between raids.

Tormented Demon.note: Post-rework multi-combat cavern; competent player chains kills. ttk per demon with prayer-swap mechanic; respawn = walk to next spawn/re-aggro. Near-continuous.

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges.note: Full v1-v6 Jad challenge gauntlet ~5-7min; ranged/melee swap. Multi-phase (multiple Jads at once in later tiers). Re-entry/setup between attempts.

TzKal-Zuk.note: Inferno run; full clear ~30-40min for competent player. Fixed long wave sequence, single attempt is a whole run. BiS ranged/melee assumed.

TzTok-Jad.note: Fight Caves full run (~63 waves) ending in Jad; ttk = whole run, fixed long minimum. Ranged + prayer flicking on Jad/healers. ~2 completions/hr realistically incl reset.

Vardorvis.note: Competent melee (fang/lance, prayer + tank switches). ttk is the fight; respawn = teleport out, restock prayer/food at altar, re-enter instance. Mechanic-heavy so deaths add variance.

Venenatis.note: Wilderness boss, melee/dragon hunter; respawn ~30s plus banking/PKer risk and re-aggro. Singles+ minus prayer. Downtime inflated by Wildy logistics.

Vet'ion.note: Wilderness, two phases + skeleton minions; crush weapon. Phase transitions add time; respawn+banking/Wildy run downtime.

Vorkath.note: Standard DHCB/DHL + special-attack handling; ~60-90s kill, ~20-30s woox-walk/teleport+re-enter between.

Whisperer.note: Magic + shadow-realm swaps; longer fight than other DT2 bosses. ttk includes both phases; respawn = sanctity reset, restock, re-enter. Lower KPH due to length, not downtime.

Wintertodt.note: Group minigame, one full game ~4min; brazier relight/restart between rounds. Solo can be slower. CA tasks revolve around per-game conditions.

Wyrm.note: Slayer task, melee/ranged in Karuulm; fast kills, brief respawn/repositioning. Continuous when on task with multiple spawns.

Yama.note: Duo BiS-ish melee/ranged, prayer-switch heavy multi-phase fight; competent ~3:00-3:30/kill (elite Speed-Trialist is <3:38). Re-challenge immediately but brief regear/prayer/restock between. Solo is slower.

Zalcano.note: Group skilling boss; one full encounter ~4-6min depending on group size. Restart/setup between. Solo slower.

Zulrah.note: Mage/range switching, multi-phase rotations. ~70-110s/kill + bank/run-back ~30s. Competent ~30/hr.
